title: Jacob Lawrence
description: Painter known for dynamic storytelling and The Migration Series.

quiz.q: Jacob Lawrence was best known as what?
quiz.explanation: Lawrence was a painter known for narrative works.

quiz.q: Which major work is Jacob Lawrence famous for?
quiz.explanation: The Migration Series is one of his best known works.

quiz.q: His paintings often focused on what?
quiz.explanation: He often painted history and daily life.

quiz.q: Why do teachers use Lawrence in lessons?
choices: His art helps tell historical stories
quiz.explanation: His art makes history visual and accessible.

quiz.q: Jacob Lawrence used art to do what?
quiz.explanation: His art conveys movement, struggle, and historical change.

title: Kehinde Wiley
description: Portrait artist known for bold backgrounds and reimagined classical poses.

quiz.q: Kehinde Wiley is best known for what kind of art?
quiz.explanation: Wiley is known for portrait painting.

quiz.q: His portraits often place subjects in what style?
quiz.explanation: His portraits often use bold decorative backgrounds.

choices: It reimagines who is seen in grand portrait traditions
quiz.explanation: His work challenges traditional portrait conventions.

quiz.q: Wiley's art often connects the present with what?
quiz.explanation: He often reworks classical portrait styles.

quiz.q: What is one big theme in Wiley's portraits?
quiz.explanation: His work highlights representation and visibility.
